title: Rusty Angel
overview: Cyberphysician Daisuke Ido comes across the remains of a female cyborg, who is still alive. Ido takes her home and restores her, transferring her into a new cyborg body.

title: Tears Sign
overview: As Yugo and Tanji prepare to leave an alley with their cyborg victim's spinal column, Vector appears and kills the cyborg to eliminate him as a witness, then admonishes Yugo for his carelessness.
